task: Harden edu tier3 free-tier runner cost gate

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion reports require evidence mapped to real verification and residual risk when a blocker remains.
Code and production changes require real runtime verification evidence; incomplete items must be reported as residual risk or blocked.

problem: `--free-tier` set DAILY_COST_LIMIT_USD=9999 after adapters.content.refiner.DAILY_COST_LIMIT had already been imported into the runner, so the runner's periodic cost check could still compare against the old $2.00 limit.
fix: When `--free-tier` is active, the runner now also updates its imported DAILY_COST_LIMIT global to 9999.0 before calling run().

verification.name: macmini free-tier sample entrypoint
verification.result: blocked: GEMINI_API_KEY_FREE is still empty on Mac Mini .env

remaining_blocker: Human must create a no-billing Google AI Studio API key and set GEMINI_API_KEY_FREE in the Mac Mini .env before the 20-item quality sample can run.
